title: Marketing Specialist B2B - Product & Content Marketing, DAS EMEIA
required_skills: Strategic campaign execution for complex offerings
matched_skills: Trade fair lead capture and pipeline development
missing_skills: 10+ years B2B marketing experience (candidate has ~4+ years — significant gap)
Annual marketing budgeting and planning ownership
core_responsibilities: Develop and lead marketing communications strategy for assigned product lines, including annual planning and budgeting
Create and manage value-driven content and campaigns for product launches and industry-specific topics
Enhance digital presence by optimizing online and social media channels
Produce and integrate customer use cases across formats aligned with central content library
Collaborate with Marketing Activation Manager and stakeholders to guide strategic messaging and campaign execution
recommended_emphasis: Highlight EMEA multi-market campaign experience explicitly — ASSA ABLOY DAS covers EMEIA and regional credibility is a key filter
Lead with B2B product launch execution examples (IoT at IPC, ATM at GRG) with measurable outcomes (e.g., 4.6M CNY in signed contracts)
Emphasize content strategy ownership: campaign briefs, sales collateral, argumentation guides, and value proposition development
Showcase cross-functional stakeholder alignment experience (product, engineering, sales, C-suite) as a differentiator
Address experience gap proactively — frame the 4+ years as high-intensity, full-ownership GTM roles rather than support roles; note the master's degree adding strategic depth
Mention complex/technical product marketing (IoT solutions, ATM/banking hardware) to match the 'complex products and solutions' preference
flags: EXPERIENCE_GAP: JD requires 10+ years B2B marketing; candidate profile shows approximately 4+ years total. This is a material mismatch and may result in early screening rejection.
